inputs.label: Span
inputs.businessContext: Clear span between supports of the ridge beam.

businessContext_i18n.en: Clear span between supports of the ridge beam.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mahya kirişinin destekleri arasındaki açık açıklık.
businessContext_i18n.de: Freie Spannweite zwischen den Auflagern des Firstbalkens
businessContext_i18n.fr: Portée libre entre les supports de la poutre faîtière.

inputs.label: Uniform Load
inputs.businessContext: Total uniform load (dead + live) acting on the ridge beam per meter length.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total uniform load (dead + live) acting on the ridge beam per meter length.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mahya kirişine metre başına etki eden toplam düzgün yayılı yük (ölü + hareketli).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtgleichlast (Eigenlast + Nutzlast) pro Meter Länge auf den Firstbalken
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge uniforme totale (permanente + d'exploitation) agissant sur la poutre faîtière par mètre de longueur.

inputs.label: Allowable Bending Stress
inputs.businessContext: Allowable bending stress for the selected wood species, adjusted for conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Allowable bending stress for the selected wood species, adjusted for conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Seçilen ahşap türü için koşullara göre ayarlanmış izin verilen eğilme gerilmesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zulässige Biegespannung für die gewählte Holzart, angepasst an die Bedingungen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Contrainte de flexion admissible pour l'essence de bois sélectionnée, ajustée pour les conditions.

inputs.label: Beam Width
inputs.businessContext: Nominal width of the ridge beam cross-section.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal width of the ridge beam cross-section.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur nominale de la section transversale de la poutre faîtière.

inputs.label: Beam Depth
inputs.businessContext: Nominal depth of the ridge beam cross-section.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal depth of the ridge beam cross-section.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur nominale de la section transversale de la poutre faîtière.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional safety factor to account for uncertainties (≥1.0).

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional safety factor to account for uncertainties (≥1.0).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirsizlikleri hesaba katmak için ek güvenlik faktörü (≥1.0).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Sicherheitsfaktor zur Berücksichtigung von Unsicherheiten (≥1,0)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de sécurité supplémentaire pour tenir compte des incertitudes (≥1,0).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
